name: Jell-o Fruit Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the batter ingredients in a large bowl. Pour the mixture into a greased 10x12 inch pan.
2. In another bowl, combine the fruit layer ingredients and spread evenly over the batter.
3. Crumble together the topping ingredients and sprinkle over the fruit layer.
4. Bake at 375°F for 35-40 minutes.
